hidden_defects.condition: parameter_narrowing_report allowed PAPER ranking proposal with non-empty source_evidence_ids but without explicit PAPER/SHADOW evidence and optimizer recommendation ids
hidden_defects.impact: A proposal could appear evidence-backed while missing required source artifact roles.

hidden_defects.ux_impact: Dashboard/operator reports can trust that parameter review source roles are explicit.
hidden_defects.profitability_impact: Prevents optimizer parameter narrowing from being driven by incomplete evidence chains.
hidden_defects.fix: Added fail-closed source evidence role checks and negative unit fixture.

hidden_defects.condition: Exact candidate_id/strategy_id/parameter_hash/timeframe/regime identity joins are not schema-enforced across source artifacts.
hidden_defects.impact: Role ids are now required, but exact source identity binding still needs schema/validator expansion.
hidden_defects.reproducibility: Observed during fixture comparison and recorded as contract gap.
hidden_defects.affected_scope: PAPER/SHADOW scorecard -> optimizer -> parameter narrowing chain
hidden_defects.live_safety_impact: MVP-5 remains blocked until exact scoped evidence identity can be independently validated.
hidden_defects.ux_impact: Operator should see blocker rather than a misleading complete evidence chain.
hidden_defects.profitability_impact: Avoids ranking candidates from mismatched evidence scopes.
hidden_defects.fix: Recorded live-affecting contract gap for next schema/validator patch.
